summary:
Individuals scoring within an IQ range of 90-109 have cognitive abilities classified as average or just above average according to typical psychological assessments. This places them squarely into the middle segment of intellectual functioning scales commonly used by clinicians for evaluation purposes. \boxed{B}

The summary concisely captures that those with a 90-109 IQ score exhibit average intellect while emphasizing their placement at the midpoint among such evaluations conducted clinically.
